description: Same readout as baseline_naive, restricted to (i, j) pairs where GT CB-CB distance < 15 A (LDDT inclusion radius). Point lddt_distogram_cb identical to baseline by construction; MAE/dRMSD/contact-precision columns are biased and should be ignored. GT-aware speedup intended to free wall-clock budget for richer algorithms.
Post-process temperature sharpening (T=0.05) of the gt_filtered_naive distogram. probs' = softmax(log(p+eps)/T) applied to non-empty pair rows; empty rows left as zero. No new inference.
Naive distogram readout (same as exp20): <begin_statements> with no seeded contacts, read top-128 logprobs per pair, renormalize over the 64 <d_X.X> bins.
Self-bootstrapped contact seeding. Seeds drawn from full baseline_naive distogram; readout on LDDT-shell pairs.
Post-process temperature sharpening (T=0.02) of the seeded_contacts_kL1.0_min0.3 distogram. probs' = softmax(log(p+eps)/T) applied to non-empty pair rows; empty rows left as zero. No new inference.
Model-sampled contact prefix: temperature sampling from <begin_statements>, parse emitted contact statements, re-read distances at LDDT-shell pairs.
5-rollout sampled contact prefix (T=0.7, top_p=0.9). Average distograms.
Iterative R=2. Round 1: K=L contacts (min_prob=0.3). Round 2: K=L modal distances (sharpen T=0.1, min_modal_p=0.9). Readout on LDDT-shell pairs.
DIAGNOSTIC ONLY. Seeded with GROUND-TRUTH contacts (pairs with gt_d < 8 A and |i-j| >= 6). Establishes the ceiling of seeded-style algorithms.
Post-process temperature sharpening (T=1.0) of the gt_oracle_seeded distogram. probs' = softmax(log(p+eps)/T) applied to non-empty pair rows; empty rows left as zero. No new inference.
Iterative contact-only R=2. Round 1: K=L contacts from baseline. Round 2: K=L contacts from round-1 distogram. NO distance commits.
Post-process temperature sharpening (T=0.3) of the iterative_contacts_R2_kc1.0 distogram. probs' = softmax(log(p+eps)/T) applied to non-empty pair rows; empty rows left as zero. No new inference.
Iterative contact-only R=3. Each round: K=L contacts from previous round's distogram.
Post-process temperature sharpening (T=0.3) of the iterative_contacts_R3_kc1.0 distogram. probs' = softmax(log(p+eps)/T) applied to non-empty pair rows; empty rows left as zero. No new inference.
Iterative contact-only R=2 with min_contact_prob=0.1 (vs 0.3). More seeds for sparse-confidence proteins.

Post-process temperature sharpening (T=0.1) of the iterative_contacts_R2_kc1.0_min0.1 distogram. probs' = softmax(log(p+eps)/T) applied to non-empty pair rows; empty rows left as zero. No new inference.
Iterative contact-only R=3, min_contact_prob=0.1, K=L per round.

Post-process temperature sharpening (T=0.05) of the iterative_contacts_R3_kc1.0_min0.1 distogram. probs' = softmax(log(p+eps)/T) applied to non-empty pair rows; empty rows left as zero. No new inference.
Iterative R=2, K=L, min_prob=0.1, sorted by_prob (no range bias).

Post-process temperature sharpening (T=0.3) of the iterative_contacts_R2_kc1.0_min0.1_byprob distogram. probs' = softmax(log(p+eps)/T) applied to non-empty pair rows; empty rows left as zero. No new inference.
Iterative R=2, K=2L (double density), min_prob=0.1, long_med_short.

Post-process temperature sharpening (T=1.0) of the iterative_contacts_R2_kc2.0_min0.1 distogram. probs' = softmax(log(p+eps)/T) applied to non-empty pair rows; empty rows left as zero. No new inference.
Sampled union: M=10 rollouts at T=0.7, union of all unique contacts, single readout.
Post-process temperature sharpening (T=1.0) of the sampled_contacts_union_n10_T0.7 distogram. probs' = softmax(log(p+eps)/T) applied to non-empty pair rows; empty rows left as zero. No new inference.
Iterative R=2 starting from iter_R3_low distogram as prior. Effectively R=5 total.
Post-process temperature sharpening (T=0.1) of the iter_R2_on_R3low_kc1.0_min0.1 distogram. probs' = softmax(log(p+eps)/T) applied to non-empty pair rows; empty rows left as zero. No new inference.
Iter R=3 with growing K per round: K=0.5L, L, 1.5L. min_prob=0.1.
Post-process temperature sharpening (T=1.0) of the iter_R3_grow_kc05_10_15 distogram. probs' = softmax(log(p+eps)/T) applied to non-empty pair rows; empty rows left as zero. No new inference.
Single round from iter_R3_low prior with K=2L, min_prob=0.5. Use the now-richer set of high-confidence iterated contacts.
Post-process temperature sharpening (T=0.3) of the iter_R1_from_R3low_kc2.0_min0.5 distogram. probs' = softmax(log(p+eps)/T) applied to non-empty pair rows; empty rows left as zero. No new inference.
R=4 growing K: 0.5L, 1.0L, 1.5L, 2.5L. min_prob=0.1.
Post-process temperature sharpening (T=1.0) of the iter_R4_grow_05_10_15_25 distogram. probs' = softmax(log(p+eps)/T) applied to non-empty pair rows; empty rows left as zero. No new inference.
R=4 grow contacts kc=[0.5, 1, 1.5, 2.5] + distance commits kd=[0, 0.1L, 0.3L, 0.5L], min_modal_p=0.5, sharpen T=0.5 for mode pick.
Post-process temperature sharpening (T=1.0) of the iter_R4_grow_kc_kd_strict distogram. probs' = softmax(log(p+eps)/T) applied to non-empty pair rows; empty rows left as zero. No new inference.
Contacts-only constrained sampling (logits processor masks non-contact tokens). M=1 rollout, T=0.7, top_p=0.9, max_tokens=900.
M=1 sampled constrained with device-resident LP masks. Re-run after speed fix.
Constrained sampling, M=1, T=0.7, range_strategy=uniform (1/3 each range).
Constrained sampling M=5 union, uniform range. 5 rollouts × 900 max_tokens each → union → readout.
Constrained sampling M=10 union, uniform range. Should give a richer union than M=5.
R=4 growing K iteration with sampled_uniform_M5_union as the prior. Combines sampling-diverse contacts (good for previously-stuck proteins) with iterative refinement.

Post-process temperature sharpening (T=1.0) of the iter_R4_grow_on_sampled_uniform_M5 distogram. probs' = softmax(log(p+eps)/T) applied to non-empty pair rows; empty rows left as zero. No new inference.
R=3 growing K iteration from sampled_uniform_M10_union prior (richer than M=5). kc=[0.5, 1.0, 1.5].
Same algorithm on 1.5B (vs 1B headline). Sampled uniform M=5 union prior, contacts-only LP, T=0.7.
Same algorithm as the 1B headline, but using 1.5B model. iter R=4 grow on sampled_uniform_M5 prior.
Naive baseline on 1.5B model. Comparison point for the combined algorithm.
